value.title: Ford CEO on JD Power win: This 'overnight success' was actually 4 years in the making
value.summary: Ford (F) was named the top mainstream brand in JD Power's 2026 US Initial Quality Study — the industry standard for vehicle quality rankings — for the first time in 16 years.

value.title: Group 1 Automotive Announces College Park Hyundai is now Group 1 Hyundai College Park
value.summary: In a strategic move to unify its extensive network of dealerships, Group 1 Automotive, Inc., a Houston-based automotive retailer with dealerships across the U.S. and U.K., today announced that College Park Hyundai has been renamed Group 1 Hyundai College Park, effective June 2, 2026, as part of the company's nationwide brand alignment initiative.

value.title: Three Hyundai Models Rank Tops in Segment in JD Power 2026 U.S. Initial Quality Study
value.summary: Hyundai Motor America today announced strong results in the JD Power 2026 U.S. Initial Quality StudySM, with three Hyundai models (Venue, Kona, Santa Cruz) each ranking highest for initial quality in their respective segments based on problems per 100 vehicles. Santa Cruz leads the Midsize Pickup segment for the third-consecutive year. These results are continued proof of Hyundai's ability to consistently deliver high initial quality across vehicle segments.
